title: Riderverse
description: based off the shows Kamen Rider
body:
This Palladium addon for Fabric and Forge 1.20.1 is based on the Kamen Rider series. You can Henshin/Transform into your favorite Kamen Rider. Each Rider has some unique abilities, like faster movement, super strength, and higher jumping. Most riders have different forms.

Riders currently available: Kuuga, Joker, and W, aka Cyclone Joker

To get Kuuga's Powers, you need to find the Kuuga Temple and put the belt in your offhand

To get Joker or W, you need to craft the belt with a tailoring bench

A lot of things are subject to change Currently in Beta
